chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P No.S-987 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Disposed of matter  For hearing of CMA No.653/2025 26.01.2026 Mr. Ashfaq Ahmed, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General ---------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner/applicant submits that purpose of the listed application being CMA No.653 of 2025 has been served, therefore, under instructions he does not wish to press it. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh records his no objection. Accordingly, listed application being CMA No.653 of 2025 stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES B-K Soomro
